en: Then all the tribes of Israel came to David at Hebron and said, "Behold, we are your bone and flesh.
zh: 以色列眾支派都到希伯崙來見大衛，說：“看哪！我們都是你的骨肉至親。

en: In times past, when Saul was king over us, it was you who led out and brought in Israel. And the LORD said to you, 'You shall be shepherd of my people Israel, and you shall be prince over Israel.'"
zh: 從前掃羅作我們的王的時候，領導以色列人行動的是你。耶和華也曾對你說：‘你要牧養我的子民以色列，要作以色列的領袖。’”

en: So all the elders of Israel came to the king at Hebron, and King David made a covenant with them at Hebron before the LORD, and they anointed David king over Israel.
zh: 以色列的眾長老都到希伯崙來見王。大衛王在希伯崙耶和華面前與他們立約，他們就膏立大衛作以色列的王。

en: David was thirty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned forty years.
zh: 大衛登基的時候是三十歲，在位共四十年。

en: At Hebron he reigned over Judah seven years and six months, and at Jerusalem he reigned over all Israel and Judah thirty-three years.
zh: 他在希伯崙作猶大的王七年零六個月；在耶路撒冷作全以色列和猶大的王三十三年。

en: And the king and his men went to Jerusalem against the Jebusites, the inhabitants of the land, who said to David, "You will not come in here, but the blind and the lame will ward you off"- thinking, "David cannot come in here."
zh: 王和隨從他的人到了耶路撒冷，要攻打住在那地的耶布斯人。耶布斯人對大衛說：“你不能進這裡來，這些瞎眼的、跛腳的就能把你抵擋住。”他們心裡想：“大衛決不能進那裡去。”

en: Nevertheless, David took the stronghold of Zion, that is, the city of David.
zh: 大衛卻攻取了錫安的保障，就是大衛的城。

en: And David said on that day, "Whoever would strike the Jebusites, let him get up the water shaft to attack 'the lame and the blind,' who are hated by David's soul." Therefore it is said, "The blind and the lame shall not come into the house."
zh: 那一天大衛說：“攻打耶布斯人的，要把大衛心中恨惡的‘瞎子’和‘瘸子’丟進水溝裡。”因此有句俗語說：“瞎眼的或瘸腿的，都不能進殿裡。”

en: And David lived in the stronghold and called it the city of David. And David built the city all around from the Millo inward.
zh: 後來大衛住在保障裡，稱保障為“大衛的城”。大衛又從米羅向裡面周圍築牆。

en: And David became greater and greater, for the LORD, the God of hosts, was with him.
zh: 大衛漸漸強大，因為耶和華萬軍的 神與他同在。

en: And Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and cedar trees, also carpenters and masons who built David a house.
zh: 推羅王希蘭差派使者來見大衛，又送來香柏木、木匠和石匠，他們就給大衛建造宮殿。

en: And David knew that the LORD had established him king over Israel, and that he had exalted his kingdom for the sake of his people Israel.
zh: 大衛就知道耶和華已經立他作以色列的王，又因自己的子民以色列的緣故，使他的國興盛。

en: And David took more concubines and wives from Jerusalem, after he came from Hebron, and more sons and daughters were born to David.
zh: 大衛離開希伯崙後，在耶路撒冷又娶了多位妃嬪，並且生了很多兒女。

en: And these are the names of those who were born to him in Jerusalem: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon,
zh: 以下這些就是他在耶路撒冷所生的孩子的名字：沙母亞、朔罷、拿單、所羅門、

en: Ibhar, Elishua, Nepheg, Japhia,
zh: 益轄、以利書亞、尼斐、雅非亞、

en: Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet.
zh: 以利沙瑪、以利雅大、以利法列。

en: When the Philistines heard that David had been anointed king over Israel, all the Philistines went up to search for David. But David heard of it and went down to the stronghold.
zh: 非利士人聽見有人膏立了大衛作王統治以色列人，就全體上來搜尋大衛。大衛聽見了，就下到保障去。

en: Now the Philistines had come and spread out in the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 非利士人來到，散布在利乏音谷。

en: And David inquired of the LORD, "Shall I go up against the Philistines? Will you give them into my hand?" And the LORD said to David, "Go up, for I will certainly give the Philistines into your hand."
zh: 大衛求問耶和華說：“我可以上去攻打非利士人嗎？你會把他們交在我手裡嗎？”耶和華對大衛說：“你可以上去，我必把非利士人交在你手裡。”

en: And David came to Baal-perazim, and David defeated them there. And he said, "The LORD has burst through my enemies before me like a bursting flood." Therefore the name of that place is called Baal-perazim.
zh: 於是大衛來到巴力．毘拉心，在那裡擊敗了非利士人，說：“耶和華在我面前沖破我的敵人，好像洪水沖破堤岸一般。”因此他給那地方起名叫巴力．毘拉心。

en: And the Philistines left their idols there, and David and his men carried them away.
zh: 非利士人把他們的神像遺棄在那裡，大衛和跟隨他的人就把它們拿走了。

en: And the Philistines came up yet again and spread out in the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 非利士人又上來，散布在利乏音谷。

en: And when David inquired of the LORD, he said, "You shall not go up; go around to their rear, and come against them opposite the balsam trees.
zh: 大衛又求問耶和華，耶和華說：“你不要直接上去，要繞到他們後面，從桑林對面攻打他們。

en: And when you hear the sound of marching in the tops of the balsam trees, then rouse yourself, for then the LORD has gone out before you to strike down the army of the Philistines."
zh: 你一聽到桑林樹梢上有腳步的聲音，就要趕快行動，因為那時耶和華已經在你前面出去擊殺非利士人的軍隊了。”

en: And David did as the LORD commanded him, and struck down the Philistines from Geba to Gezer.
zh: 於是大衛照著耶和華所吩咐他的去作，擊殺非利士人，從迦巴直到基色。
